examples.title: Non-Max Suppression
examples.code:
ALGORITHM NMS
INPUT: boxes, scores, threshold
BEGIN
  Sort boxes by scores descending
  Initialize selected_boxes = []
  WHILE boxes not empty:
    Pick top box b
    Add b to selected_boxes
    Remove boxes with IoU(b, others) > threshold
  RETURN selected_boxes
END
examples.explanation: Iteratively selects most confident boxes and suppresses overlaps

examples.title: U-Net Model Snippet
examples.explanation: Shows encoder-decoder structure with feature concatenation
